description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic, slightly bulging cylindrical shape and flat top and bottom surfaces. The exterior is composed of vertical wooden staves, each subtly textured with visible wood grain, and the structure is reinforced by two thick, dark metal hoops encircling the upper and lower thirds of the barrel. The wood appears aged and matte, giving the barrel a rustic, utilitarian look suitable for urban or industrial settings. The top is closed and flush, with no visible opening or lid, and there are no handles or spouts present. The surface is generally smooth but with a natural wood texture, and the metal bands add a slight sheen. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A medium-sized, closed wooden barrel with dark metal hoops and a rustic, matte finish. The surface is textured with wood grain and reinforced by two metal bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bulging cylindrical shape, wood grain, and both metal hoops clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, similar to the front, with the same features visible and no additional details.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, maintaining the same appearance with wood texture and metal bands.
description_view_3: Final rotated view, identical in features to the previous views, showing the consistent design all around.
